basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Principal Project Associate, Young Professional Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Principal Project Associate and Young Professional-II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR IARI Principal Project Associate and Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Principal Project Associate: Maximum 40 years. Young Professional-II: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation of five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC is applicable.

qualification.details: Principal Project Associate: Essential: i) M.Tech/ME/MCA/PhD in computer science/ Information Technology/Atmospheric science/ AI/ML/Atmospheric Science/ Data or System analytics from a recognized university/ institution with first class or OGPA >6.0. ii) More than 6 years of experience in programming and developing the Decision Support systems / web page/ android apps with proofs. Desirable: Experience / Knowledge in Configuring Web Map server, programming in C#/Python / Javascript/.net/Android and cloud computing/ web sources / GIS tools, 3D graphics/ animation/ 3-D modeling, and knowledge in crop/hydrological/climate simulation models, econometric models and analysis of climate model data. Young Professional-II: Essential: 1. MSc/ or PhD in Economics/Ag Economics/ social studies/ climate science/AI/ML/Data Science or related equivalent with first class or OGPA >6.0 from a recognized university / institution. Desirable: Knowledge in data processing, programming in R / Python / LINUX/ web sources / GEE/ GIS tools, and Open-source development exposure using APIs, and knowledge in crop production data analysis; Python/ R /MATLAB programming, Experience / Knowledge of both GIS & Remote Sensing tools, GEE, Open source web Geo-visualization.

selection_process: Screening of Applications Online Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR IARI recruitment is 25th May 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the ICAR IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: ICAR IARI is recruiting for two posts: Principal Project Associate and Young Professional-II. Both positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Principal Project Associate post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Principal Project Associate post is M.Tech/ME/MCA/PhD in computer science, IT, Atmospheric science, AI/ML, or related fields, with at least 6 years of programming experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational requirement for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: For the Young Professional-II role, candidates need an MSc or PhD in Economics, Ag Economics, social studies, climate science, AI/ML, Data Science, or equivalent, with a first-class or OGPA of 6.0 or above.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by ICAR IARI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Principal Project Associate and Young Professional-II posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 40 years for Principal Project Associate and 35 years for Young Professional-II. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST, women, and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q7. How will the candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications, followed by an online interview. Document verification will be the final step.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the ICAR IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply via email. They need to send their complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are needed for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs along with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the link to apply via email can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. Please ensure you check all details before applying.
